title: thermopsis lanceolata var. glabra
intro: Thermopsis lanceolata var. glabra, also known as Glabrous Goldenraeflower or Smooth Prairie-creeper, is a perennial plant in the legume family native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thermopsis lanceolata var. glabra include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of various cardiovascular and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying and infusing the leaves and roots, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal remedy.
